name: Poppy Seed Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 stick margarine or butter plus 3 Tbsp softened
4 eggs, room temperature, separated into yolks and whites
1 can poppy seed filling, Solo is fine
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the poppy seed filling and stir until combined.
3. Lightly beat egg yolks. Add yolks along with sour cream and vanilla. Blend well.
4. Stir together flour, salt, and baking soda. Mix into the poppy seed mixture.
5. Beat egg whites until fluffy. Fold a few streaks of whites into the batter.
6. Pour batter into a greased and floured Bundt pan.
7. Bake for about 1 hour at 350 degrees F.
8. Store well-wrapped to keep the cake fresh for a long time.
